gist.headline: Fresh Ink
gist.blurb: The daily news dispatch has been filed to the front page.
gist.summary: Automated update to the README.md latest news section to reflect recent changes.
gist.impact: Ensures the GitHub landing page displays the most current project updates.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations.ai bee pinning a piece of paper to a cork bulletin board. The board has other pixel art notes. Cozy, low-stakes maintenance vibe.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot pinning a news update to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Pixel text on paper: 'NEWS'. Nostalgic and organized.
